creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Indirectly via FreshPorts: 

* <https://portsfallout.com/fallout?port=www%2Fh2o-devel%24&env=i386>

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commits/main/www/h2o-devel> no mention of i386. 

----

Whilst <https://www.freshports.org/www/h2o-devel/#packages> does list packages for FreeBSD:11:i386, I should ignore such listings in the context of <https://github.com/FreshPorts/freshports/issues/341>.
